hero.label: Turnkey Events
hero.subtitle: From intimate presentations to large-scale festivals — full-cycle event management

overview.label: What's Included
overview.title: Full-Cycle Management
overview.description: We take care of everything — from strategy and creative concept to technical production and coordination. You get results, not process.

items.label: Guests in 20 years
items.description: Total audience across our festivals, concerts, and events

items.label: Projects delivered
items.description: From intimate corporate events to international festivals for 50,000+ people

items.label: Years in business
items.description: Operating since 2004 — one of Moldova's longest-standing event operators

items.label: Clients return
items.description: Repeat business and long-term contracts are our key quality indicator

items.quote: Media Show Grup has been our general contractor since 2017. Each year, National Wine Day attracts over 200,000 guests, and every time the MSG team delivers flawless organization.
items.author: Dionis Boroga
items.role: Director, National Office of Vine and Wine

items.quote: The first-ever mass event at the Presidential Residence. MSG took on everything — from logistics to scenography. The result exceeded expectations.
items.author: Organizing Committee

items.quote: For the first time, the Eurovision final was moved from a studio to an arena. MSG developed the concept, built the stage, and coordinated the entire process — from rehearsals to live broadcast.
items.author: Production Team

items.question: How much does a turnkey event cost?
items.answer: Costs depend on format, scale, venue, and program. We work with budgets from $5,000 for corporate events to $500,000+ for international festivals. After the briefing, we prepare a detailed estimate with justification for each expense item.

items.question: How far in advance should we contact you?
items.answer: Ideally 3-6 months for large events and 1-2 months for corporate events. Festival preparation starts 6-12 months ahead. In urgent cases, we can organize an event in 2-3 weeks.

items.question: Do you only work in Moldova?
items.answer: Our primary geography is Moldova and Romania. However, we've delivered projects in other countries as well. Our team and infrastructure ensure consistent quality in any location.

items.question: What does 'turnkey' include?
items.answer: Everything: from concept and script development to technical production, artist booking, logistics, marketing, security, and on-site coordination. You get one point of contact responsible for the entire project.

items.question: How do you control the budget?
items.answer: We work with transparent estimates: every expense item is agreed upon in advance. You see where every dollar goes. After the event, we provide a complete financial report with supporting documents.

items.question: Can we order just some of the services?
items.answer: Yes, we can provide technical production, artist booking, video production, or logistics separately. We take a modular approach — you choose only what you need.

cta.title: Ready for your dream event?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your event — we'll provide the solution

festivalul-lupilor.about: Festivalul Lupilor is one of the largest event tourism projects in Moldova, held in the Old Orhei nature reserve. Starting as an intimate concert, the project has evolved over the years into a large-scale regional open-air festival. Today it is a multi-day event with camping, fairs and interactive zones that annually attracts tens of thousands of guests and draws tourists from abroad.
festivalul-lupilor.services: Media Show Grup has been the festival organizer since its inception, providing a full production cycle. Our team develops the creative concept and promotion strategy, and implements proprietary IT solutions for ticket sales and verification. We manage complex technical production, venue construction, security coordination and logistics within the nature reserve. Special attention is given to the program and interactive content: the festival seamlessly blends folklore with contemporary music genres, offering activities for guests of all ages and featuring both local and international artists.
festivalul-lupilor.result: Systematic project development has ensured steady annual audience growth and established the festival as a significant national event. The choice of location in the Old Orhei reserve has given a powerful boost to the region's tourism potential, while the implementation of modern event technologies has effectively integrated cultural heritage into a contemporary entertainment format.

ziua-vinului.about: National Wine Day is an annual festival held since 2002 on the first weekend of October in Chișinău's central square. The event brings together Moldova's leading winemakers and attracts thousands of guests from around the world. The program includes professional tastings, thematic workshops, gastronomic and artisan fairs, and a large-scale concert program featuring folk and contemporary artists.
ziua-vinului.services: For seven years (2017–2024, excluding 2020) Media Show Grup served as the general contractor, providing full technical and organizational support. We were responsible for script development, venue zoning, coordination of winemakers and economic agents, logistics management, decoration production and comprehensive equipping of all zones — from the main stage to interactive sectors.
ziua-vinului.result: Years of project execution and a systematic approach to organization transformed the celebration into a world-class event, strengthening Moldova's international image. The festival provided a powerful impulse for the development of the wine industry, meeting the standards of major global expositions and attracting professional community attention.

traditii-romanesti.about: Festivalul Tradițiilor Românești is an international cultural project aimed at promoting the heritage of Romania's historical regions. The festival is conceived as a 'cultural bridge' uniting authentic crafts, folklore and contemporary art. The program traditionally includes folk artisan exhibitions, a food court with regional cuisine and a large concert program featuring Romanian and local performers.
traditii-romanesti.services: In 2024, the Media Show Grup team executed the project at the Botanical Garden of Chișinău. We provided comprehensive management including concept development and 3D venue modeling, as well as full coordination with artists and participants. The technical department handled stage construction assembly, sound and lighting direction, and provided multi-camera live broadcast of all performances to screens in real time.
traditii-romanesti.result: Precise process synchronization and strict adherence to timing allowed the successful execution of a rich international program. The team created a comfortable space for cultural exchange where professional management highlighted the authenticity of traditions while ensuring a high level of service for guests and participants.

festivalul-padurilor.about: Festivalul Pădurilor is a unique project under the patronage of the President of the Republic of Moldova, dedicated to ecology, national traditions and uniting society around the National Reforestation Program. The festival concept allowed guests to immerse themselves in an atmosphere of unity with nature through interactive exhibitions, workshops and a music program in the natural forest landscape.
festivalul-padurilor.services: Media Show Grup became the first company to organize a mass event on the territory of the Presidential Residence in Condrița. Our team provided a full cycle of event preparation and management. We developed a detailed navigation system and ergonomic venue map, produced scenography and decor elements ensuring visual unity across all zones. The technical department handled main and secondary stage assembly, video screen integration for discussion panels, full site electrification, and artistic lighting and sound throughout the entire territory. A separate focus was creating dynamic media content: from motion graphics to multi-camera filming and the final aftermovie.
festivalul-padurilor.result: We successfully integrated large-scale infrastructure into the forest ecosystem without environmental damage. Creating a functional and safe space highlighted the national significance of the reforestation program while providing an exceptional level of comfort for visitors at a non-standard location.

soundstalgic.about: Soundstalgic is a large-scale multimedia show by Dan Balan, Moldova's only Grammy-nominated artist. The original concept is based on a retrospective of his 30-year career and the evolution of his musical style. The project is realized as a complex stage narrative where high-tech projections, lighting and set design create a unified visual space, connecting legendary world hits with the performer's personal musical world.
soundstalgic.services: The Media Show Grup team executed the complete technical cycle of the project, from stage and set assembly to designing artistic lighting scenarios synchronized by timecode with sound and screen graphics. We implemented unique solutions including floor-mounted screens with plexiglass covering, provided filming and live broadcasting to screens, and ensured security at entrance gates, grandstands and around the stage. A particular challenge was the extreme schedule: due to parallel setup of another show, we worked with cross-allocated resources while maintaining precise timing for rehearsals and the performance itself.
soundstalgic.result: Flawless synchronization of lighting, sound and video enabled the execution of a world-class high-tech show while fully preserving its unique concept. The team created a cohesive visual space, giving audiences pure emotions and a total immersion effect in the concert atmosphere.

eurovision.about: The National Eurovision Final became a landmark musical event of 2026, marking Moldova's return to the international contest after a one-year hiatus. For the first time in history, the show was moved from television studios to the country's largest indoor venue — Arena Chișinău. This decision allowed organizers to fundamentally change the selection format, transforming it into a spectacular arena show where audiences could experience the final live, support their favorites and become part of a large-scale television production with live sound and modern production values.
eurovision.services: The Media Show Grup team prepared and executed the project in extremely tight deadlines — just two weeks. Working closely with organizers and venue management, we were responsible for concept development, 3D design and assembly of complex stage structures including technical zones, Green Room and visual space design. Our responsibilities included comprehensive artist and host coordination, logistics, technical performance support, graphic content creation and live broadcast direction. One of the most complex tasks was coordinating all departments during the live broadcast: through thorough rehearsals and precise management, backline and set changes for 16 artists were executed in minimal intervals, seamlessly invisible to live broadcast viewers.
eurovision.result: We delivered a high-tech show meeting European broadcasting standards where every element worked like clockwork. The high production standard ensured a flawless on-air picture, which was specifically noted by international experts. The success of the 2026 final elevated the national selection to a new level, demonstrating Media Show Grup's readiness for the most complex projects and European-level format management.

ddt-istanbul.about: The DDT concert on November 29, 2025 in Istanbul marked the finale of an extensive world tour. The legendary rock band's performance took place at one of the city's largest concert venues, drawing thousands of fans from different countries. The program combined iconic hits with new compositions, accompanied by a high-tech light and video show that demanded flawless technical execution and strict compliance with the artists' international rider.
ddt-istanbul.services: Media Show Grup served as the general technical contractor, taking on a complex array of logistical and operational tasks. The key challenge was transporting equipment and crew from Chișinău to Istanbul, including organizing customs procedures and finding specialized carriers. Simultaneously, we coordinated delivery of additional equipment from Greece. Coordinated work enabled synchronization of equipment arrival with specialist flights, ensuring timely assembly of the stage, screens, sound and lighting systems, and professional multi-camera filming with broadcast direction to screens.
ddt-istanbul.result: The team provided technical support for the world tour's final show under tight timing and complex international logistics. We built an effective supply chain across multiple countries, and the impeccable quality of sound and visual effects solidified the company's reputation as a reliable partner for executing large-scale concert tours at international venues.

zdob-si-zdub.about: The anniversary concert 'Zdubii Forever' at Arena Chișinău celebrated thirty years of the legendary band's career. The show brought together Zdob și Zdub and guest artists including Irina Rimeș, the Advahov brothers, Satoshi and many others on one stage. The event showcased a synthesis of rock and Balkan folklore, becoming one of the year's most notable musical events and uniting fans of the band across generations.
zdob-si-zdub.services: Media Show Grup provided comprehensive project support, deploying resources from all divisions. We handled organizational logistics, complete technical equipping of the arena (stage, sound, lighting, screens, backline), as well as assembly of a themed photo zone and merchandise sales area. The video production team provided multi-camera filming and live broadcast of performances to screens, while the holding's security service managed all venue zones — from entrance gates to backstage.
zdob-si-zdub.result: Coordinated work across all departments enabled the execution of a technically complex arena show with precise timing and high safety standards. We created a powerful audiovisual environment that amplified the energy of the live performance and ensured quality sound and lighting coverage throughout the entire arena.

scriptonite.about: Scriptonite's first performance in Chișinău took place on March 8, 2024 and became one of the most anticipated events of the concert season. A performance by an artist of this caliber required flawless technical preparation capable of conveying the unique sound and complex visual concept of the show in a large arena setting.
scriptonite.services: The Media Show Grup team served as the general technical contractor for the concert. We provided stage assembly, lighting and sound equipment, screen installation and full backline according to the artist's rider. Special attention was given to executing the lighting score: a complex fixture configuration enabled the realization of custom lighting scenarios, creating the deep atmosphere characteristic of Scriptonite's live performances.
scriptonite.result: Thanks to the high class of equipment used, we achieved ideal sound quality and detailed lighting show rendering, fully meeting the artist's international standards. The project confirmed the holding's ability to provide a technical base for riders of any complexity, guaranteeing stable operation of all systems during a top performer's live show.
